services.title: Infant Care
services.body: Personalized care for babies up to 12 months old.

services.title: Toddler Activities
services.body: Educational and fun activities for toddlers aged 1-3 years.

services.title: Emotional Support
services.body: Providing a nurturing environment to support emotional development.

services.title: Flexible Scheduling
services.body: Customizable care hours to fit your family's schedule.

services.title: Safety First
services.body: Comprehensive safety measures and secure premises.

services.title: Physical Development
services.body: Outdoor play and physical activities to promote healthy growth.

faqs.a: Yes, we are fully registered with Ofsted and comply with all regulations.

faqs.q: Do you provide meals for the children?
faqs.a: We offer nutritious homemade meals tailored to each child's dietary needs.

faqs.q: What is your policy on sick children?
faqs.a: Children showing signs of illness are not accepted and must remain at home until fully recovered.

faqs.q: How do I book a visit?
faqs.a: Contact us via phone or email to schedule a visit. We'll discuss your needs and arrange a convenient time.
